site.title: Interactive Physics Book
site.tagline: An interactive physics lab — text, equations, and live simulations
hero.title: Infrastructure ready for interactive physics content
hero.body: This is the technical foundation of the book: a design system, full Arabic/RTL support, equation rendering with MathJax, and a framework for interactive simulations. Chapter 1 has not started yet.
showcase.title: Reusable UI building blocks
showcase.card1.title: Info card
showcase.card1.body: Used to present concepts and experiments in every future chapter.
showcase.card2.title: Tabs
showcase.card2.body: Organizes chapter content: explanation, examples, experiment.
showcase.card3.title: Simulation container
showcase.card3.body: A resizable viewport for upcoming interactive simulations.

sim.demo.title: Tech demo: simulation framework
sim.demo.body: A test simulation to verify the render loop and resizing — not part of Chapter 1 content.
